data_coverage_summary: TrueLayer publishes public documentation and raw OpenAPI artifacts for payments, payouts, VRP, merchant accounts, data API connections, verification, payment links, mandates, and related webhooks.
buyer_guidance: Use TrueLayer APIs for open-banking payments, payouts, merchant account operations, connection-based data access, verification, and variable recurring payment flows. This is an open-banking platform, not an asset or telemetry platform.
overview: TrueLayer's public docs organize the platform into payments, payouts, Signup+, VRP, data, and verification products and expose raw machine-readable artifacts such as the Payments API v3 JSON spec. The public documentation covers payment creation, payout flows, merchant accounts, provider availability, connection creation, account and transaction data retrieval, verification, payment links, mandates, recurring-payment workflows, and webhooks, along with quickstarts and integration checklists. This is a strong write-capable open-banking platform, but it does not represent asset or telemetry data. Asset data is Unsupported. Telemetry data is Unsupported. Writeback is Supported.

available_data.description: TrueLayer exposes end-to-end money movement workflows for merchants and open-banking payment experiences.
data_points: Merchant account balances, transactions, and payment sources
relevant_operations: Get data about your merchant accounts
Get your merchant account transactions or payment sources

available_data.category: Data access, verification, and recurring authorization
available_data.description: The platform also provides connection-based data retrieval and consented recurring payment or verification workflows.
data_points: Data API connections and consent flows
relevant_operations: Create a payment on a mandate

ingest_considerations: TrueLayer's public platform spans multiple distinct product families and specs, so downstream use should pin the relevant product surface rather than assuming one uniform contract across payments, data, and verification.
Provider and country availability materially affect what can be used in production, so buyer enablement depends on geography and connected-bank support as well as API documentation.
This row has exact machine-readable spec evidence because TrueLayer publishes raw OpenAPI JSON artifacts under docs.truelayer.com/openapi.

source_evidence.evidence_notes: TrueLayer's public docs cover payments, payouts, merchant accounts, Data API connections, verification, payment links, mandates, and recurring-payment workflows, and the documentation host serves a raw Payments API v3 OpenAPI JSON artifact.
